results.requirement_text: The system shall require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials.

test_cases.title: One-time code entry required after valid login credentials
test_cases.objective: Verify that the system enforces one-time code entry after valid login credentials are submitted
preconditions: Configured prerequisites for exercising this capability are available.

steps.expected_result: The system should not progress without one-time code entry

steps.action: Attempt to proceed without entering one-time code

test_cases.expected_result: The system enforces one-time code entry
assumptions: Exact entry point for one-time code is not specified

traceability.coverage_item: System enforces one-time code entry by preventing progression when the code is omitted after valid login credentials are submitted

source_basis: require a user to enter a one-time code after submitting valid login credentials
